languages.text: {n}Поджав губы, манипулус бухтит:{/n} "Резюмируя данный излишне педантичный пассаж: Нунциус не считает праведность хоть сколько-то значимым фактором данных изысканий. Если бы я не уважал своего дражайшего коллегу, я бы сказал, что это является вопиющим непониманием концепции Триасоматы, и свидетельствует о крайней узости мышления. Но я выше подобных ремарок".

{n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."
languages.original_text: {n}Поджав губы, манипулус бухтит:{/n} "Резюмируя данный излишне педантичный пассаж: Нунциус не считает праведность хоть сколько-то значимым фактором данных изысканий. Если бы я не уважал своего дражайшего коллегу, я бы сказал, что это является вопиющим непониманием концепции Триасоматы, и свидетельствует о крайней узости мышления. Но я выше подобных ремарок".

Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

languages.text: {n}唇を閉じて、マニピュラスは唸りながら言った。{/n}「彼の過剰に学究的な回答を要約すると、ヌンシウスは、この研究において正義が重要な要素であるとは考えていない。もし、私の最も親しい同僚に対する尊敬が少しでも薄ければ、これはトライアスモータの概念に対する重大な誤解であり、極端な閉鎖性を示していると言ってしまうだろう。しかし、そのような発言は私の品位に合わない」
languages.original_text: {n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

traits.locale_text: 唇を閉じて、マニピュラスは唸りながら言った。「彼の過剰に学究的な回答を要約すると、ヌンシウスは、この研究において正義が重要な要素であるとは考えていない。もし、私の最も親しい同僚に対する尊敬が少しでも薄ければ、これはトライアスモータの概念に対する重大な誤解であり、極端な閉鎖性を示していると言ってしまうだろう。しかし、そのような発言は私の品位に合わない。」

languages.text: {n}操纵者抿起嘴唇，低声道。{/n}“概括一下他过于迂腐的回答：努恩修斯认为正义问题并非这项研究中的重要考量因素。若非出于对我最亲密同僚的尊重，我一定会说，这是对三相体概念的严重误解，是思维极端狭隘的铁证。不过此等言辞有失我的身份。”
languages.original_text: {n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者抿起嘴唇，低声道。{/n}“概括一下他过于迂腐的回答：努恩修斯认为正义问题并非这项研究中的重要考量因素。若非出于对我最亲密同僚的尊重，我一定会说，这是对三相体概念的严重误解，是思维极端狭隘的铁证。不过此等言辞有失我的身份。”

languages.text: {n}El manipulus aprieta los labios y gruñe:{/n} «Como explicación a su respuesta cargada de pedantería, le diré que Nuncius no considera que la virtud sea un factor en absoluto significativo para esta investigación. De sentir menos respeto por mi buen colega, diría que eso constituye una gigantesca malinterpretación del concepto del triasómata y es señal de una estrechez de miras extrema. Pero jamás me rebajaría a realizar comentarios similares».
languages.original_text: {n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus aprieta los labios y gruñe:{/n} «Como explicación a su respuesta cargada de pedantería, le diré que Nuncius no considera que la virtud sea un factor en absoluto significativo para esta investigación. De sentir menos respeto por mi buen colega, diría que eso constituye una gigantesca malinterpretación del concepto del triasómata y es señal de una estrechez de miras extrema. Pero jamás me rebajaría a realizar comentarios similares».

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus schnaubt mit zusammengepressten Lippen: {/n} "Ich darf seine überaus pedantische Antwort zusammenfassen: Nuncius hält Rechtschaffenheit hinsichtlich seiner Forschung für keinen signifikanten Faktor. Hätte ich auch nur etwas weniger Respekt für meinen geschätzten Kollegen, würde ich sagen, das ist eine ungeheuerliche Fehlinterpretation des Konzeptes des Triasomatas und ein Zeichen extremer Engstirnigkeit. Aber derartige Bemerkungen sind unter meiner Würde."
languages.original_text: {n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Manipulus schnaubt mit zusammengepressten Lippen: {/n} "Ich darf seine überaus pedantische Antwort zusammenfassen: Nuncius hält Rechtschaffenheit hinsichtlich seiner Forschung für keinen signifikanten Faktor. Hätte ich auch nur etwas weniger Respekt für meinen geschätzten Kollegen, würde ich sagen, das ist eine ungeheuerliche Fehlinterpretation des Konzeptes des Triasomatas und ein Zeichen extremer Engstirnigkeit. Aber derartige Bemerkungen sind unter meiner Würde."

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus marmonne à travers ses lèvres pincées :{/n} « Pour condenser sa réponse excessivement pédante : Nuncius estime que la vertu ne devrait pas être considérée comme un facteur d'une quelconque importance dans ces recherches. Si j'avais moins de respect pour mon cher collègue, je dirais que cette opinion dénote une incompréhension flagrante du principe du Triasomata ainsi qu'une étroitesse d'esprit inadmissible. Mais ce genre de remarque est indigne de moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus marmonne à travers ses lèvres pincées :{/n} « Pour condenser sa réponse excessivement pédante : Nuncius estime que la vertu ne devrait pas être considérée comme un facteur d'une quelconque importance dans ces recherches. Si j'avais moins de respect pour mon cher collègue, je dirais que cette opinion dénote une incompréhension flagrante du principe du Triasomata ainsi qu'une étroitesse d'esprit inadmissible. Mais ce genre de remarque est indigne de moi. »

languages.text: {n}Dudaklarını birbirine bastıran Manipülus homurdanıyor.{/n} "Aşırı bilgiçlik taslayan cevabını özetlemek gerekirse... Nuncius, doğruluğun bu araştırmada katiyen önemli bir faktör olmadığını düşünüyor. Pek değerli meslektaşıma bu kadar saygı duymasam bunun, Üçyeköz kavramının fahiş bir şekilde yanlış anlaşıldığını gösterdiğini ve aşırı dar görüşlülüğün bir göstergesi olduğunu söylerdim. Ancak bu tür sözler bana yakışmaz."
languages.original_text: {n}Pressing his lips together, the Manipulus grunts out,{/n} "To condense his overly pedantic response: Nuncius does not consider righteousness to be in any way a significant factor in this research. Had I any less respect for my dearest colleague, I would say that this constitutes an egregious misunderstanding of the concept of the Triasomata, and is indicative of extreme closed-mindedness. But such remarks are beneath me."
